root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ,(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ) as prename ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ,(select mem_type_desc from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type) as mem_type_desc
, sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.moo , sc_mem_m_member_address.road , sc_mem_m_member_address.soi , sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol , pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as district_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as province_name , sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode , sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone
,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as approve_tdate ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adtm_date_1!' ) as share_stock ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount
,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_life_text ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ) as date_of_birth ,'!adtm_date_1!' as adtm_date
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_member_address ,sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info
where sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '1' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no asc
